HGSS.486.0000:
That Pokégear you have--
it’s way too cool!\f
Is that the...latest model?
HGSS.486.0001:
Erika is a master of Grass-type
Pokémon.\f
She’ll make you pay if you don’t
watch yourself.
HGSS.486.0002:
The Game Corner in this city used
to be run by Team Rocket...\f
But when Team Rocket was removed,
this rich, game-loving man renovated\r
the Game Corner for the fun of it.
